sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47798" key="qalia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θᾰλιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n47798.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enjoy oneself, make merry</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.746f</biblScope></bibl>, al. (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θαλειάζω</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">357e</biblScope> </bibl>); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑορτὴν θ</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
